word.definition: Someone or something described as implacable is not capable of being appeased or changed.

sports_fact.text: Roger Federer started as a ballboy at the Basel tournament he later won ten times.

market.headline: Stock Market Today: AI Jitters Weigh on Nasdaq Futures
market.summary: SK Hynix stock slumps after blockbuster U.S. debut, oil rises

quote.text: Trump and I, we’ve had a hell of a journey. I hate it to end this way. Oh my God, I hate it. From my point of view, he's been a consequential president. All I can say is count me out. Enough is enough.
quote.author: Lindsey Graham

history.text: The Congress of the Confederation enacts the Northwest Ordinance establishing governing rules for the Northwest Territory. It also establishes procedures for the admission of new states and limits the expansion of slavery.
